title: Admin Pack
description: These modifications are useful for administrators of almost any Minecraft server. It has multiple mods that improve gameplay convenience and enjoyment.
body:
# Introduction
We have been administrators for Minecraft servers for a long time, but we've always struggled to find useful mods. In the past, no one has created kits specifically useful for administrators, for some unknown reason. Therefore, we decided to create it ourselves after spending some time. Currently, the pack is fully functional and has been created in such a way that it is not overloaded. It has modifications specifically aimed at optimizing and increasing the usefulness of server administration for small and large projects. Our philosophy will remain the same, even if the set changes significantly: maximize benefits with minimal actions.
# Reasons to use our pack
### Optimisation
We have gathered the top modifications that, in our view, enhance the game's performance.
### Frequent updates.
We will ensure that the pack is compatible with new versions and that all mods are updated on time.
### The First
This is the first pack of its kind aimed at improving the game experience for administrators.
# Features
- View and edit [NBT](https://minecraft.fandom.com/wiki/NBT_format) of any item.
- View item recipes, chest loots and mob drops with cool mod [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi).
- Change gamma level just by two buttons.
- Store in chat up to 30k+  messages and enjoy some useful features such as copying, searching, and replying.
- Saving commands or messages you sent during past sessions.
- View the contents of containers by hovering over them with the mouse in the inventory.
- Quick in-game menu for premade commands and messages, that you can bind to any key.
- Download in game resource packs with mod [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify).
- You can find additional features in the in-game mod menu.
